project.description: Job3 - Deployment: start HRMS stack with docker compose

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -eux
COMPOSE_PROJECT="${COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME:-hrms-main}"
echo "Job3 - HRMS Deploy (staging)" mkdir -p backups
docker compose -p "${COMPOSE_PROJECT}" -f docker-compose.yml down --remove-orphans || true docker compose -p "${COMPOSE_PROJECT}" -f docker-compose.yml up -d --build
for i in $(seq 1 24); do if docker exec hrms_db mysqladmin ping -h localhost -uroot -prootpass 2>/dev/null; then echo "DB healthy" break fi sleep 5 done
cat sql/database_setup.sql | docker exec -i hrms_db mysql -uroot -prootpass hrms_db || true
for i in $(seq 1 12); do if docker exec hrms_web curl -fsS -o /dev/null http://localhost/ 2>/dev/null; then echo "Web healthy" break fi sleep 5 done
docker ps --filter name=hrms_ echo "Deploy complete - http://localhost:8080"
